title: drejerella mirabiloides
intro: Drejerella mirabiloides is a genus of flowering plants in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the "Mirabilis plant" or "Four o'clock flower". The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. Its health benefits include relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption, and its leaves and roots can be used in poultices to treat various ailments.
